channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: US seized $500M in Iranian crypto assets, Treasury secretary says
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US has seized nearly $500 million in Iranian crypto assets, surpassing the previously reported $344 million freeze.

item.title: Seasonal trends favor bulls even as bitcoin ends April in a defensive mood
item.description: Your day-ahead look for April 30, 2026

item.title: South Korea’s Shinhan Card taps Solana to test real-world stablecoin payments
item.description: Shinhan Card signed a deal with Solana Foundation to expand stablecoin payment tests and explore non-custodial wallets and DeFi-based services.

item.title: Bitcoin faces $80,000 resistance as derivatives shows signs of risk aversion
item.description: Bitcoin faces profit-taking pressure near $80,000, backed up by a U.S. inflation report that comes as high oil prices and rising bond yields weigh on risk assets.

item.title: Australia draft payments vision eyes stablecoin interoperability
item.description: A draft vision for Australia’s domestic payments system says stablecoins and tokenized fiat currency could reshape how money moves across future rails.

item.title: Wasabi Protocol drained of $4.5 million in apparent admin key compromise
item.description: The exploit used a playbook similar to Drift's $285 million breach earlier this month: a compromised deployer key with no timelock or multisig that drained funds.

item.title: Crypto becomes most muted topic on X, and AI slop may be the culprit
item.description: Crypto has become the most-muted topic on X since the platform launched its snooze feature, with AI-generated spam and InfoFi posting likely driving users to tune it out.

item.title: Ethereum to $60K? It's a 'generational play' for ETH bull Tom Lee, says analyst
item.description: ETH price is retesting a long-term support trend line that previously preceded a 5,200% rally, a fractal setup pointing to a potential move toward $60,000 by 2030.

item.title: Bitcoin eyes $75K after 'most hawkish' FOMC as oil hits highest since 2022
item.description: Bitcoin price action remained weak as the US-Iran war delivered a Fed meeting that was the "most hawkish in years" and oil neared four-year highs.

item.title: XO Market bets on user-generated prediction markets to rival Polymarket and Kalshi
item.description: Backed by 20VC, Picus Capital and Coinbase Ventures; XO lets users create and profit from their own prediction markets, and plans to rollout a new vault product to democratize market making.

item.title: Dogecoin zooms 10%, breaking away from bitcoin as open interest hits a yearly peak
item.description: Open interest in DOGE-tracked futures climbed to 15.36 billion tokens, a sign that traders are adding fresh leverage as the memecoin’s price surges.

item.title: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial races toward 62 billion token unlock with near-unanimous vote
item.description: Proposal introduces vesting for 40.7 billion insider tokens after 2-year cliff, even as voting power remains concentrated among a handful of large holders

item.title: Meta rolls out stablecoin payouts for creators in Philippines, Colombia
item.description: The latest stablecoin move comes years after Meta first dipped its toes into stablecoins through Libra in 2019, before scrapping the plans in 2022 due to regulatory pushback.

item.title: US Senator Tillis to push Senate Banking vote on stalled crypto bill
item.description: Republican Senator Thom Tillis says the Senate’s version of the CLARITY Act has “made a lot of progress,” and it was time for lawmakers to vote on advancing the bill.

item.title: Crypto Tops List of Most Muted Topics on X Feeds - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE9tYXBXcGQyOFQ5MmtHX0tULWl0cGdoLUw3c3luR1dIM1AxNXdMSm51R2hwSkhhdVEybkZ5NTVudlJvaHFLclkwODJjckNyMXdWeGY4cndFYw?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto Tops List of Most Muted Topics on X Feeds…

item.title: Ouch. The U.S. 30-year Treasury yield just hit 5% and bitcoin may pay the price
item.description: Hawkish dissent within the Federal Reserve, elevated oil prices and rising long-term inflation expectations are pushing bond yields higher.

item.title: Bitcoin slides toward $75,000, ETH, SOL, XRP drop as oil hits four-year high
item.description: Crypto sold off across the board with bitcoin down 2.1% and ether off 3.4% as Brent crude surged 7.1% to $126 a barrel on reports President Trump is being briefed on military options for Iran.

item.title: Ripple is opening its new Middle East and Africa regional HQ in the @DIFC: on.ripple.com/4mZjoMP Six years after our first Dubai office, the Middle East is now one of our most significant markets globally and demand for regulated blockchain infrastructure co - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9DckNrVlNPR0dPMUo2ZjhFb19hMk4yaHJvRzg5MVFJNmhiLVdPTjR2bUF6aUY0ZFF5Q1BRMm5oUWl5NzdfVGFzT2l5QTB5MUFVTDVtYVNGbUs1WVU?oc=5" target="_blank">Ripple is opening its new Middle East and A…

item.title: WLFI drops 14% as controversial token unlock goes to vote
item.description: The proposal to unlock more than 62 billion WLFI tokens over four to five years has 99.95% approval but is still facing backlash on X.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Twenty One Capital rises on proposed merger with Strike and Elektron
item.description: Tether proposed that Elektron founder and CEO Raphael Zagury serve as president of the proposed merged company, while Strike's Jack Mallers would also serve in an executive role.

item.title: Hyperliquid’s HYPE token could be its prediction market weapon, Arthur Hayes says
item.description: HIP-4 could become a dominant prediction-market venue because Hyperliquid users can get economic exposure to platform usage through HYPE, unlike users of Polymarket or Kalshi.

item.title: US, UAE and China joint effort dismantles 9 crypto scam centers
item.description: In another police action, European police arrested 10 people and took down three scam centers, estimated to have stolen over $58 million from victims around the world.

item.title: Bitcoin futures signal caution as long-to-short ratio signals positioning shift
item.description: Bitcoin derivatives highlight traders’ nervous view as the Federal Reserve holds interest rates and BTC struggles to trade above its range highs. Are the bears back?

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Eric Trumps predicts "Bitcoin is going to hit $1 million." "I don't know if it's 2030, I don't know if it's 2031, but I absolutely believe it gets there." "I have never been more bullish on this asset class in my life." 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBhUU1BZkZvaE82ckR0NHRiZVNzSWxGaXFVaWQ1aG54dkMyYndUUE5TV1l3Y1BRNWtEa1Z5SHVmQTZaM0J1RGdOYURwZENXYVhOT0Z0STdNa2pEMzNISmZ2Q0FqN3B5VmM?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Eric Trumps p…

item.title: Bitcoin recovery stalls after Fed holds interest rates, citing ‘uncertainty’ in Middle East
item.description: Bitcoin dropped under $75,000 after FOMC minutes showed the US Federal Reserve holding interest rates and expressing slight concerns over inflation and the war in Iran.

item.title: Google and Microsoft Just Proved the AI Trade Is Alive—While OpenAI Is Sweating
item.description: Alphabet and Microsoft crushed Q1 estimates on the same day, with Google Cloud up 63% and Microsoft's AI business hitting a $37 billion run rate.

item.title: Jack Mallers' Twenty One Capital surges after majority holder Tether proposes 3-way merger
item.description: Tether has moved to combine bitcoin treasury, mining, and financial services under one roof.

item.title: Labor Department Launches AI Apprenticeship Portal as Trump Admin Continues AI Policy Push
item.description: The Labor Department unveils an online hub to help workers and employers build AI skills amid a quickly changing jobs market.

item.title: Big Tech's multi-billion dollar AI bets are still on track as Mag 7 giants report earnings
item.description: The four Mag 7 giants reported quarterly results on Wednesday, showing that they are still on track to spend multi-billion on AI. Here is what it means for crypto.

item.title: RealOpen and TRON verify $9.4M in USDT for crypto-enabled real estate purchases
item.description: RealOpen, the leading platform for buying real estate with crypto, today announced the conclusion of its collaborative "Fast Moves, Fast Payments" Holiday Campaign with TRON

item.title: Mayo Clinic Says AI Can Detect Pancreatic Cancer Years Before Human Doctors
item.description: The AI model analyzes subtle tissue changes on routine CT scans invisible to human specialists, detecting pancreatic cancer up to three years earlier than doctors can.

item.title: Key Senator Pushes for Vote on Clarity Act—But Hurdles Remain
item.description: Thom Tillis, a swing GOP vote on the Senate Banking Committee, says his colleagues should take up a months-delayed vote on the crypto bill.

item.title: Meta Launches USDC Stablecoin Creator Payouts on Solana and Polygon via Stripe
item.description: Facebook and Instagram parent company Meta is now offering stablecoin payouts to content creators in certain countries.

item.title: Stable Sea integrates WisdomTree tokenized Treasury fund for cash management
item.description: Businesses can now allocate idle cash to a government-backed fund via Stable Sea, as tokenized Treasury products gain traction in corporate finance.

item.title: Eric Trump says bitcoin in its 'greatest period ever' as Wall Street falls in line
item.description: Speaking at Bitcoin Las Vegas 2026, the American Bitcoin co-founder declared the last six months a turning point.

item.title: Price predictions 4/29: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, XMR
item.description: Bitcoin’s sell-off accelerated leading into this week’s FOMC, but charts highlight some positives for BTC and altcoins.

item.title: Celsius Founder Alex Mashinsky Banned From Crypto Industry in $10 Million FTC Settlement
item.description: The settlement represents a massive reduction from an initial $4.7 billion judgment against the Celsius founder.

item.title: This AI Was Trained Only on Pre-1930 Text. We Asked It About Hitler, Stocks, and the Future
item.description: Talkie-1930 is a 13-billion-parameter model that has never heard of the internet, World War II, or modern politics. The results are fascinating, funny, and occasionally unsettling.

item.title: Fed chair Jerome Powell says he will stay on as Govenor after term amid legal pressure
item.description: During a press conference following the Fed's interest rate decision, Powell said ongoing scrutiny and political tension forced him to stay, despite his plans to step down.

item.title: Tech giant Meta starts paying some creators in stablecoin with Stripe's support
item.description: The tech giant is first offering the feature to select creators in Colombia and the Philippines.

item.title: Kustodia launches smart contract escrow for LATAM's $600m fraud crisis
item.description: Mexico's first peso-denominated blockchain escrow goes live on SPEI for high-value P2P transactions.

item.title: Bitcoin falls as traders cut risk ahead of FOMC: Will TradFi, spot ETF volumes bolster $70K support?
item.description: Bitcoin price volatility tends to spike before and after the FOMC, a pattern that is playing out this week. Will institutional investor BTC buying protect the $70,000 support?

item.title: KuCoin EU hires new AML chief after Austria ban on new business under MiCA
item.description: KuCoin EU hires a new AML chief and deputies in Vienna weeks after Austria’s regulator banned the MiCA‑licensed exchange from taking on new business over compliance gaps.

item.title: White House Weighs Reinstating Anthropic for Federal Use Amid Pentagon Fight: Report
item.description: Trump officials reportedly drafted guidance to help agencies access Anthropic’s AI, including Claude Mythos, despite Pentagon restrictions.

item.title: JPMorgan hires former Goldman Sachs exec for Kinexys. Here is why he believes tokenization is only half the battle
item.description: JPMorgan’s new crypto head Oliver Harris has previously warned that tokenizing assets isn't a magic fix for liquidity, but believes the technology is finally ready to "rip out" and replace the financial industry's legacy back end.

item.title: The ‘tokenization of everything’ is no longer a theory
item.description: Wall Street is moving in. Washington has changed sides. And Consensus 2026 is where crypto’s biggest inflection point gets decided.

item.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Dip as Fed Holds Rates Steady for Third Straight Time
item.description: Wednesday's FOMC meeting was expected to be Jerome Powell’s last as Federal Reserve chair.

item.title: U.S. senator holding cards on Clarity Act's next move says it's ready to get to hearing
item.description: Senator Thom Tillis was at the center of the legislative negotiations over stablecoin yield that have delayed the market structure bill, but he said it's time to go.

item.title: Fed leaves rates unchanged at Jerome Powell's final meeting as chairman
item.description: The U.S. Federal Reserve's next meeting in June is likely to be led by Kevin Warsh after he cleared a Senate Banking Committee vote on Wednesday.

item.title: U.K.'s Farage faces standards probe over $6.7 million gift from Tether billionaire Christopher Harborne
item.description: The Conservative and Labour parties argued Nigel Farage broke Commons rules by not declaring the £5 million, but Reform UK said it was an exempt, personal, unconditional gift.

item.title: Tether Stakeholder Gave Farage Undisclosed $6.7M Gift Amid Reform UK Crypto Funding Scrutiny
item.description: The personal gift to the Reform UK leader from billionaire Christopher Harborne comes amid scrutiny over crypto industry political funding.

item.title: Bitcoin Faces Resistance Near $80,000 as Options Positioning Caps Upside According to Bloomberg, Bitcoin is facing repeated resistance near $80,000 as concentrated call option positioning on Deribit triggers market makers to sell into price rallies under lon - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9WSHFaQms3Tlh6S3dXcWJuQ3EyeE1zTHpuOFplRWY3TkVnZ0JhcUQ2LUxONDY4RXJ1MW5rTFBTOFJpRnVVV3g3dWhZNVVkR0o1T1o2ejJoekx3QVpFVGkxY1B3QQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin Faces Resistance Near $8…

item.title: Robinhood, Coinbase lead crypto stock rout as Trump rejects Iran plan
item.description: President Trump reportedly rejected Iran's offer to end the U.S. blockade and open the Strait of Hormuz, sending crude oil prices surging 6%.

item.title: OpenAI Sued Over Failure to Warn Police Before Tumbler Ridge Mass Shooting
item.description: A California lawsuit could test whether AI companies have a legal duty to report violent threats after a mass shooting in British Columbia.

item.title: Canadian Government Pushes for Sweeping Ban on Bitcoin, Crypto ATMs
item.description: The country hosts nearly 4,000 crypto ATMs, second only to the U.S.

item.title: Trapped Below Market Mean bitcoin:native remains capped below the True Market Mean, with support at $65k–$70k. Spot selling is easing and flows stabilise, but demand is weak. Heavy short positioning leaves room for squeezes. Read the full Week On-Ch - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1VbWxSNTFGalZQY3BXM2tIQW1KSVdtbG85bkl5YjVJdU9fYW5Vd1NUOUVXbWdsVzZmOXpMZ2p6RlpuRDFVVlRWclJkRmRHd2RnTUUyR3R1X3pxMkJLc1V3?oc=5" target="_blank">Trapped Below Market Mean bitcoin:nati…

item.title: MoonPay Launches Institutional Division, Acquires Crypto Key Management Firm Sodot
item.description: Crypto payments processor MoonPay is expanding into institutional services with a veteran regulator at the helm.

item.title: Polymarket Eyes US Return for Crypto Exchange as Lone CFTC Chair Weighs Approval​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
item.description: With four of five CFTC commissioner seats vacant, the decision on whether to lift Polymarket's U.S. ban rests with Chair Michael Selig alone.

item.title: Visa Adds Base, Polygon, Canton, Arc and Tempo to Stablecoin Settlement Program
item.description: Payments giant Visa scales its blockchain settlement infrastructure with five new networks as pilot program shows 50% quarterly growth.
